scripts.seed: docker exec melius-backend-dev sh -c 'cd /app/apps/backend && tsx prisma/seed.ts'
scripts.seed2: docker exec melius-backend-dev sh -c 'cd /app/apps/backend && tsx prisma/seed2.ts'
scripts.prisma:generate: docker exec melius-backend-dev sh -c 'cd /app/apps/backend && pnpm exec prisma generate'
scripts.prisma:studio: docker exec melius-backend-dev sh -c 'cd /app/apps/backend && pnpm exec prisma studio'
scripts.prisma:push: docker exec melius-backend-dev sh -c 'cd /app/apps/backend && pnpm exec prisma db push'
scripts.db:clean: docker exec -it postgres psql -U postgres -d postgres -c 'TRUNCATE TABLE "User", "UserProfile", "DocProfile", "AdminProfile", "Meeting", "Payment", "AvailabilitySlot", "Rating" CASCADE;'
